

=== Properties ===
Minimal Height: 4   

Maximum Height: 4   

Radius: 24   

Chance: 1   

Music: Sunrise   

=== Structures ===
====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.016   

Log: Oak Log   

Top: Oak Top   

Height: 12   

Height Variation: 10   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 5   

leafRadius_variation: 6   

leaves: Oak Leaves   

type: Round   

[[Category:Coastal_Biomes]]
